skills.name: Covering Fire
skills.description: Attack multiple enemies by firing at a targeted area.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 11 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Snipe
skills.description: Aim and fire at a faraway enemy. The usual range of fire is increased and the attack heavily damages a single enemy.

skills.name: Penetration Shot
skills.description: Fire continuously in a straight line in front of you until the maximum range of fire. The attacked enemies might be pushed back.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Volleyfire
skills.description: Repeatedly fire at a single enemy.

skills.name: Prime and Load
skills.description: Reset the cooldown of Musketeer's attack skills and remove [Sniper Exposed] buff.
skills.effect_text:
[Covering Fire] Cooldown reset
[Penetration Shot] Cooldown reset
[Volleyfire] Cooldown reset
Your [Sniper Exposed] buff is removed

skills.name: Grooving Muzzle
skills.description: Receive [Enhance Steel Wire] buff on use.
skills.effect_text:
Musketeer Attack Skill Final Damage increases by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 seconds

attributes.name: Gun: Accuracy
attributes.description: * Increases accuracy by 5% per attribute level when you attack an enemy

attributes.name: Covering Fire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Covering Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Snipe: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Snipe] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Penetration Shot: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Penetration Shot] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Volleyfire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Volley Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Musketeer: Safe Distance
attributes.description:
* Pushes you back when using a subweapon attack

* Can be used every 15 sec

attributes.name: [Arts] Covering Fire: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Covering Fire] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Snipe: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Snipe] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Penetration Shot: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Penetration Shot] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Volleyfire: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Volleyfire] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Snipe: Head Shot
attributes.description:
* Following effects are applied once every 15 seconds when using Snipe

- When calculating skill damage of Snipe, caster's accuracy decreases by 50%

- Target's Block unavailable when accurately hit

- Fixed Critical Hit when accurately hit

- Knocked down when accurately hit

- Apply [Snipe: Wound] debuff and give damage every second by 10% of the damage inflicted (Duration: 5 seconds)

attributes.name: Snipe: Promised Hit
attributes.description:
* Without [Sniper Exposed] buff, the target can not evade

* Increases SP consumption by 30%
